parameters.subsql:
WITH base_leads AS (
      SELECT
          pal.crm_id,
          pal.account_id,
          pal.contacts_amo_id,
          pal.geo,
          pal.creation_date,
          pal.creation_date_time,
          pal.qual,
          pal.booking_event,
          lst.telegram_id          -- сразу сохраняем telegram_id лида
      FROM mart.perfomance_all_leads pal
      LEFT JOIN core.lead_selected_telegram lst
             ON lst.leads_id   = pal.leads_id
            AND lst.account_id = pal.account_id
      WHERE LOWER(pal.utmsource) = 'zakupka'
        AND pal.broker_pipeline = 1
  ),
  ts_leads AS (
      SELECT
          ts.crm_id,
          ts.source_geo,
          ts.invite_link_name,
          ts.category,
          ts.date_join,
          ts.telegram_id
      FROM mart.telegram_logs_svodny ts
      WHERE ts.lead = 1
  )

  SELECT
      bl.crm_id,
      bl.account_id,
      bl.contacts_amo_id,
      bl.geo,
      ts.source_geo,
      bl.creation_date,
      bl.creation_date_time,
      bl.qual,
      bl.booking_event,
      bl.telegram_id,                 -- telegram_id теперь всегда есть, если он известен в Amo
      ts.date_join,
      ts.invite_link_name AS telegram_source,
      ts.category,
      CASE WHEN ts.crm_id IS NULL THEN 'no_telegram_source' ELSE 'has_source' END AS telegram_source_status
  FROM base_leads bl
  LEFT JOIN ts_leads ts ON ts.crm_id = bl.crm_id
  ORDER BY bl.creation_date DESC

parameters.db_version: PostgreSQL 16.11 (Debian 16.11-1.pgdg13+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 14.2.0-19) 14.2.0, 64-bit
